dialogContent.headerText: Creating the following prediction market asset: {{symbol}}
dialogContent.updateHeaderText: Updating the following prediction market asset: {{symbol}}

card.title: Creating a new Prediction Market Asset
card.description: By creating a Prediction Market Assets you can act as the house for decentralized bets on future events in return for a comission fee without winnings pool counterparty risk exposure.
card.updateDescription: Update your prediction market asset's details, settings, and metadata.

asset.title: Asset identity
asset.description: The unique symbol, name and supply for your prediction market asset.

pma.title: Prediction market details
pma.description: The condition that defines what your market is betting on.

nft.title: Non-fungible token details
nft.description: Optional. Add NFT metadata such as artist, title and IPFS media.

extensions.title: Market fee extensions
extensions.description: Optional. Configure how market fees are split between the house, referrers and taker.

permissions.title: Permissions and flags
permissions.description: Choose which advanced behaviours this asset supports.

authorization.title: Authorization
authorization.description: Optional. Whitelist and blacklist accounts that may interact with this asset.

classification.title: Category & sub category
classification.description: Optionally classify your prediction market for easier discovery.

summary.label: Review and submit
summary.ready: Ready to create your prediction market asset.
summary.readyUpdate: Ready to update your prediction market asset.
summary.fieldsRequired: A few required fields are still empty.
summary.title: What you're creating
summary.subtitle: A summary of the prediction market asset you are about to launch. Verify everything looks correct before submitting.
summary.name: Name
summary.noBacking: Pick a backing asset to see it here.
summary.noCondition: Write a condition to see it here.

tips.submitHint: Submitting will open your wallet to broadcast an on-chain transaction. You will still be able to cancel inside Beet/BeetEOS before signing.

pma.title: Prediction Market Asset Details
pma.title_content: These are the asset settings used for the prediction market asset.

condition.header_content: Provide the prediction market asset details here
condition.placeholder: Will SpaceX land Starship on Mars before 2030?

commission.header_content: The commission is the fee which the house takes for creating and evaluating the prediction market asset.

backing_asset.header_content: The backing asset is the asset that is used to back the prediction market asset, This asset will be used to pay out the winners of the prediction market asset.

resolution.header_content: The resolution date and time is the date and time at which the prediction market asset will be resolved, This is the date and time at which the prediction market asset will be evaluated and the winners will be paid out.

category.header_content: Select a category that best describes your prediction market.

subcategory.header_content: Optionally narrow down the classification within the chosen category.

fee.hover: Estimated network fee for creating this prediction market asset. The actual fee depends on the symbol length, data size, and current network parameters.
fee.updateHover: Estimated network fee for updating this prediction market asset.

expiryWarning.title: Expiry time change warning
expiryWarning.description: This prediction market has already expired and there is an active prize pool with participants who have placed bets. Changing the expiry time may fundamentally alter the terms of their bets, which could upset participants and damage your organization's reputation. Please proceed only if you are certain this change is necessary.

org.label: Organization
org.help: Select the PMO organization this sub-asset belongs to.

subAssetName.label: Sub-asset name
subAssetName.help: The unique name for this prediction within the organization (e.g., 0001).

creationMode.noOrgs: No organizations found. Create a PMO asset first.
creationMode.label: Creation Mode
